flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Dalton State College fell 37% between 2006 and 2009 (26.1% → 16.5%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Dalton State College fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (9.9% → 7.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Dalton State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Dalton State College fell 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($15.0k → $12.9k).
